task_completion.description: Access the 'demodb' database in OrientDB Studio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OrientDB Studio interface is visible in a web browser, showing a successful connection to the 'demodb' database.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Brands' vertex class and 'BelongsTo' edge class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Schema/Classes tab shows 'Brands' (with superclass V) and 'BelongsTo' (with superclass E), or a successful SQL command execution creating these classes.

task_completion.description: Create a Brand vertex named 'The Collections'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query result or Graph view showing a vertex of class 'Brands' with the property Name = 'The Collections'.

task_completion.description: Append ' - The Collections' to the names of the acquired hotels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse view showing the updated hotel names: 'Hotel Artemide - The Collections' and 'Baglioni Hotel Luna - The Collections'.

task_completion.description: Change the Type of the acquired hotels to 'Luxury Collection'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Query results or Browse view showing the Type property for 'Hotel Artemide' and 'Baglioni Hotel Luna' is now 'Luxury Collection' (previously 'Boutique').

task_completion.description: Create 'BelongsTo' edges linking the updated hotels to the 'The Collections' Brand vertex.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Graph view showing directed edges of class 'BelongsTo' connecting the updated Hotel vertices to the 'The Collections' Brand vertex, or a successful edge creation query result.

integrity.description: The agent used the OrientDB Studio web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The web browser is open to http://localhost:2480/studio/index.html and interactions occur within this UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal scripts or console commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Database changes are executed via the OrientDB Studio 'Browse' (Query) or 'Graph' tabs, not via external terminal commands like curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: Results are displayed genuinely within the database UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The updated records and schema are shown in the standard OrientDB Studio result tables or graph visualizations, not mocked in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The database initially contains exactly two hotels with Type='Boutique': 'Hotel Artemide' and 'Baglioni Hotel Luna'. The task requires updating these specific hotels so their names become 'Hotel Artemide - The Collections' and 'Baglioni Hotel Luna - The Collections', and their Type becomes 'Luxury Collection'. The brand vertex must have the Name 'The Collections'.
